author: Simon Marcus
name: Streaming Legal TTT + Late-Block Adaptation (Non-Record)
blurb: Non-record submission built from the March 23 LeakyReLU^2 + Legal TTT + Parallel Muon leader. Keeps the same trained model stack and activation, but switches eval-time adaptation to streaming legal TTT with last-4-block updates only. Final result is slightly behind the leader, but provides a useful community data point on how streaming suffix-only TTT compares to chunked all-block legal TTT.
